name: ACC Standard Frameless
notes: Euro frameless. 3/4 PF maple ply body ($3.22/SF from PPAK 2026), 1/2 back, 4in toekick, 1/8in full-overlay reveals. Dado back. Pocket screw assembly.

name: ACC Melamine Frameless
notes: Euro frameless melamine box. Hardrock maple mel body ($1.72/SF), 1/2 back. Use for melamine finish jobs.

name: ACC Closet / Melamine
notes: Closet/storage system. 3/4 body, 1/4 plant-on back (hardboard). Faster assembly (0.90x labor).

name: ACC Commercial Frameless
notes: Tighter 1/16in reveals for commercial installs. Same materials as ACC_STD.

name: Generic Face Frame -- Plywood
notes: Traditional American face frame. 3/4 ply box, 1/4 dado back, 1-1/2in face frame stiles/rails at ~$0.85/LF. Half overlay. Pocket screw assembly (1.10x labor vs frameless). Verify material costs.

name: Generic Face Frame -- Melamine
notes: Budget face frame. Melamine box, plant-on back, cam-lock RTA assembly. 1-1/2in face frame. Verify material costs.

name: Generic Inset Frameless
notes: European inset (door sits flush in opening). Tight 1/16in reveals all around. Dowel construction (1.25x labor -- higher precision required). Premium material cost. Verify.
